mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, COALESCE(array_to_json(preferred_locations)::text, '[]') as preferred_locations, COALESCE(array_to_json(food_preferences)::text, '[]') as food_preferences, COALESCE(array_to_json(travel_preferences)::text, '[]') as travel_preferences, COALESCE(array_to_json(dietary_restrictions)::text, '[]') as dietary_restrictions, budget_range, preference_weights, additional_preferences, total_queries, last_query_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id::text = #{userId}::text LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id::text = #{userId}::text
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM user_profiles
INSERT INTO user_profiles ( id, user_id, preferred_locations, food_preferences, travel_preferences, dietary_restrictions, budget_range, preference_weights, additional_preferences, total_queries, last_query_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId},
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{preferredLocations} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{preferredLocations}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL ,
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{foodPreferences} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{foodPreferences}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL ,
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{travelPreferences} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{travelPreferences}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL ,
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{dietaryRestrictions} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{dietaryRestrictions}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL , #{budgetRange}, #{preferenceWeights}, #{additionalPreferences}::jsonb, #{totalQueries}, #{lastQueryAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_profiles SET preferred_locations =
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{preferredLocations} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{preferredLocations}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL , food_preferences =
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{foodPreferences} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{foodPreferences}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL , travel_preferences =
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{travelPreferences} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{travelPreferences}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL , dietary_restrictions =
string_to_array(replace(substring(#{dietaryRestrictions} from 2 for greatest(0, length(#{dietaryRestrictions}) - 2)), '"', ''), ',')
NULL , budget_range = #{budgetRange}, preference_weights = #{preferenceWeights}, additional_preferences = #{additionalPreferences}::jsonb, total_queries = #{totalQueries}, last_query_at = #{lastQueryAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
